---
title: "Anaerobic Digestion Process Report"
subtitle: "mADM1 Simulation Results"
date: "{{ meta.report_date }}"
template: "anaerobic_cstr_madm1"
model: "mADM1"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    css: report.css
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

<div class="report-header">
<div>

# Anaerobic Digestion Process Report

**Model:** mADM1 (63 components) | **Template:** {{ meta.template_name }}

</div>
<div class="report-meta">
<span class="label">Report Date</span>
<span>{{ meta.report_date }}</span>
<span class="label">Simulation ID</span>
<span>{{ meta.simulation_id }}</span>
</div>
</div>

## Process Performance

<div class="kpi-grid">
  <div class="kpi-card {{ data.diagnostics.cod_class }}">
    <div class="kpi-label">COD Removal</div>
    <div class="kpi-value">{{ data.performance.COD_removal_pct | round(1) }}</div>
    <div class="kpi-unit">%</div>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-card {{ data.diagnostics.ch4_class }}">
    <div class="kpi-label">CH4 Yield</div>
    <div class="kpi-value">{{ data.performance.specific_CH4_yield_m3_kg_COD | round(3) }}</div>
    <div class="kpi-unit">Nm3/kg COD</div>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-card kpi-ok">
    <div class="kpi-label">OLR</div>
    <div class="kpi-value">{{ data.performance.OLR_kg_COD_m3_d | round(2) }}</div>
    <div class="kpi-unit">kg COD/m3/d</div>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-card kpi-ok">
    <div class="kpi-label">HRT</div>
    <div class="kpi-value">{{ data.reactor.HRT_days | round(1) }}</div>
    <div class="kpi-unit">days</div>
  </div>
</div>

## Diagnostic Summary

<div class="diag-panel">
  <p><span class="status-dot status-{{ data.diagnostics.cod_status }}"></span><strong>COD Removal</strong> {{ data.performance.COD_removal_pct | round(1) }}%</p>
  <p><span class="status-dot status-{{ data.diagnostics.h2s_status }}"></span><strong>H2S (biogas)</strong> {{ data.biogas.h2s_ppm | round(0) }} ppm</p>
  <p><span class="status-dot status-{{ data.diagnostics.inhibition_status }}"></span><strong>Max Inhibition</strong> {{ data.diagnostics.max_inhibition_pct | round(1) }}%</p>
  <p><span class="status-dot status-{{ data.diagnostics.vfa_status }}"></span><strong>VFA/Alkalinity</strong> {{ data.inhibition.VFA.VFA_ALK_ratio | round(3) }}</p>
</div>

{% if data.thresholds.h2s_ppm and data.biogas.h2s_ppm > data.thresholds.h2s_ppm %}
::: {.callout-warning}
H2S concentration ({{ data.biogas.h2s_ppm | round(0) }} ppm) exceeds threshold ({{ data.thresholds.h2s_ppm }} ppm).
:::
{% endif %}

{% if data.diagnostics.max_inhibition_pct > data.thresholds.inhibition_pct %}
::: {.callout-warning}
Maximum inhibition ({{ data.diagnostics.max_inhibition_pct | round(1) }}%) exceeds threshold ({{ data.thresholds.inhibition_pct }}%).
:::
{% endif %}

## Influent/Effluent Comparison

| Parameter | Influent | Effluent | Removal |
|:----------|----------:|---------:|--------:|
{% for row in data.stream_comparison %}
| {{ row.parameter }} | {{ row.influent }} {{ row.unit }} | {{ row.effluent }} {{ row.unit }} | {{ row.removal_pct }}% |
{% endfor %}

## Flowsheet Diagram

{% if data.flowsheet.has_diagram %}
![System Flowsheet](flowsheet.svg){.flowsheet-diagram}
{% else %}
<div class="ts-placeholder">
[Flowsheet diagram not generated - run with output directory to generate]
</div>
{% endif %}

{% if data.flowsheet.units %}
### Unit Operations

| # | Unit ID | Type | Inlets | Outlets |
|--:|:--------|:-----|:-------|:--------|
{% for u in data.flowsheet.units %}
| {{ u.number }} | {{ u.id }} | {{ u.type }} | {{ u.inlet_ids | join(', ') }} | {{ u.outlet_ids | join(', ') }} |
{% endfor %}
{% endif %}

{% if data.flowsheet.streams %}
### Stream Mass Balance

| Stream | Flow (m³/d) | COD (mg/L) | TN (mg/L) | TP (mg/L) |
|:-------|------------:|-----------:|----------:|----------:|
{% for s in data.flowsheet.streams %}
| {{ s.id }} | {{ s.flow_m3_d | round(1) }} | {{ s.COD_mg_L | round(1) if s.COD_mg_L else 'N/A' }} | {{ s.TN_mg_L | round(1) if s.TN_mg_L else 'N/A' }} | {{ s.TP_mg_L | round(1) if s.TP_mg_L else 'N/A' }} |
{% endfor %}
{% endif %}

{% if data.unit_analysis %}
## Per-Unit Analysis

{% for unit_id, unit in data.unit_analysis.items() %}
### {{ unit.unit_id }} ({{ unit.unit_type }})

{% if unit.parameters %}
<dl class="spec-block">
{% if unit.parameters.V_max_m3 %}<dt>Volume</dt><dd>{{ unit.parameters.V_max_m3 | round(0) }} m³</dd>{% endif %}
{% if unit.parameters.V_liq_m3 %}<dt>Liquid Volume</dt><dd>{{ unit.parameters.V_liq_m3 | round(0) }} m³</dd>{% endif %}
{% if unit.parameters.HRT_days %}<dt>HRT</dt><dd>{{ unit.parameters.HRT_days | round(2) }} days</dd>{% endif %}
{% if unit.parameters.temperature_K %}<dt>Temperature</dt><dd>{{ (unit.parameters.temperature_K - 273.15) | round(1) }} °C</dd>{% endif %}
{% if unit.parameters.split_ratio %}<dt>Split Ratio</dt><dd>{{ unit.parameters.split_ratio | round(2) }}</dd>{% endif %}
</dl>
{% endif %}

{% if unit.inlets %}
**Inlet Streams:**

| Stream | Flow (m³/d) | COD (mg/L) | TSS (mg/L) |
|:-------|------------:|-----------:|-----------:|
{% for inlet in unit.inlets %}
| {{ inlet.stream_id }} | {{ inlet.flow_m3_d | round(1) if inlet.flow_m3_d else 'N/A' }} | {{ inlet.COD_mg_L | round(1) if inlet.COD_mg_L else 'N/A' }} | {{ inlet.TSS_mg_L | round(1) if inlet.TSS_mg_L else 'N/A' }} |
{% endfor %}
{% endif %}

{% if unit.outlets %}
**Outlet Streams:**

| Stream | Type | Flow (m³/d) | COD (mg/L) | TSS (mg/L) |
|:-------|:-----|------------:|-----------:|-----------:|
{% for outlet in unit.outlets %}
| {{ outlet.stream_id }} | {{ outlet.stream_type | default('liquid') }} | {{ outlet.flow_m3_d | round(1) if outlet.flow_m3_d else 'N/A' }} | {{ outlet.COD_mg_L | round(1) if outlet.COD_mg_L else 'N/A' }} | {{ outlet.TSS_mg_L | round(1) if outlet.TSS_mg_L else 'N/A' }} |
{% endfor %}
{% endif %}

{% if unit.removal_efficiency %}
**Removal Efficiency:**

| Parameter | Removal |
|:----------|--------:|
{% if unit.removal_efficiency.COD_removal_pct %}| COD | {{ unit.removal_efficiency.COD_removal_pct | round(1) }}% |{% endif %}
{% if unit.removal_efficiency.TSS_removal_pct %}| TSS | {{ unit.removal_efficiency.TSS_removal_pct | round(1) }}% |{% endif %}
{% if unit.removal_efficiency.TN_removal_pct %}| TN | {{ unit.removal_efficiency.TN_removal_pct | round(1) }}% |{% endif %}
{% endif %}

---

{% endfor %}
{% endif %}

## Biogas Production

<div class="two-col">
<div>

### Flow Rates

| Metric | Value | Unit |
|:-------|------:|:-----|
| Total Biogas | {{ data.biogas.flow_total_Nm3_d | round(1) }} | Nm3/d |
| Methane Flow | {{ data.biogas.methane_flow_Nm3_d | round(1) }} | Nm3/d |
| Specific Yield | {{ data.performance.specific_CH4_yield_m3_kg_COD | round(3) }} | Nm3/kg COD |

</div>
<div>

### Composition

| Component | Concentration |
|:----------|-------------:|
| CH4 | {{ data.biogas.methane_percent | round(1) }}% |
| CO2 | {{ data.biogas.co2_percent | round(1) }}% |
| H2 | {{ data.biogas.h2_percent | round(2) }}% |
| H2S | {{ data.biogas.h2s_ppm | round(0) }} ppm |

</div>
</div>

## Inhibition Analysis

### Inhibition Factors

| Factor | Inhibition | Activity | Concentration | K_I |
|:-------|----------:|----------:|--------------:|----:|
{% for f in data.inhibition.inhibition_factors %}
| {{ f.type }} | {{ f.inhibition_pct | round(1) }}% | {{ f.activity_factor | round(3) }} | {{ f.concentration_mg_L | round(1) }} mg/L | {{ f.KI_kg_m3 | round(4) }} kg/m3 |
{% endfor %}

### VFA Speciation

| VFA | Concentration (mg COD/L) |
|:----|-------------------------:|
| Acetate | {{ data.inhibition.VFA.acetate_mg_COD_L | round(1) }} |
| Propionate | {{ data.inhibition.VFA.propionate_mg_COD_L | round(1) }} |
| Butyrate | {{ data.inhibition.VFA.butyrate_mg_COD_L | round(1) }} |
| Valerate | {{ data.inhibition.VFA.valerate_mg_COD_L | round(1) }} |
| **Total VFA** | **{{ data.inhibition.VFA.total_VFA_mg_COD_L | round(1) }}** |

## Sulfur Cycle

<div class="two-col">
<div>

### Mass Balance

| Metric | Value | Unit |
|:-------|------:|:-----|
| Sulfate In | {{ data.sulfur.sulfate_in_mg_L | round(1) }} | mg S/L |
| Sulfate Out | {{ data.sulfur.sulfate_out_mg_L | round(1) }} | mg S/L |
| Removal | {{ data.sulfur.sulfate_removal_pct | round(1) }} | % |

</div>
<div>

### Sulfide Speciation

| Species | Concentration |
|:--------|-------------:|
| Total Sulfide | {{ data.sulfur.sulfide_total_mg_L | round(1) }} mg S/L |
| H2S (dissolved) | {{ data.sulfur.H2S_dissolved_mg_L | round(2) }} mg S/L |
| HS- (dissolved) | {{ data.sulfur.HS_dissolved_mg_L | round(2) }} mg S/L |
| H2S (biogas) | {{ data.sulfur.h2s_biogas_ppm | round(0) }} ppm |

</div>
</div>

### SRB Biomass

| SRB Guild | Biomass (mg COD/L) |
|:----------|-------------------:|
| X_hSRB (H2-oxidizing) | {{ data.sulfur.X_hSRB_mg_COD_L | round(2) }} |
| X_aSRB (Acetate) | {{ data.sulfur.X_aSRB_mg_COD_L | round(2) }} |
| X_pSRB (Propionate) | {{ data.sulfur.X_pSRB_mg_COD_L | round(2) }} |
| X_c4SRB (Butyrate/Valerate) | {{ data.sulfur.X_c4SRB_mg_COD_L | round(2) }} |
| **Total SRB** | **{{ data.sulfur.srb_biomass_mg_COD_L | round(2) }}** |

## Reactor Configuration

<dl class="spec-block">
<dt>Liquid Volume</dt>
<dd>{{ data.reactor.V_liq_m3 | round(0) }} m3</dd>
<dt>Headspace Volume</dt>
<dd>{{ data.reactor.V_gas_m3 | round(0) }} m3</dd>
<dt>Temperature</dt>
<dd>{{ data.reactor.temperature_C | round(1) }} C</dd>
<dt>HRT</dt>
<dd>{{ data.reactor.HRT_days | round(1) }} days</dd>
<dt>Influent Flow</dt>
<dd>{{ data.influent.flow_m3_d | round(0) }} m3/d</dd>
</dl>

## Simulation Status

<dl class="spec-block">
<dt>Status</dt>
<dd>{{ data.simulation.status }}</dd>
<dt>Converged At</dt>
<dd>{{ data.simulation.converged_at_days | round(1) }} days</dd>
<dt>Duration</dt>
<dd>{{ data.simulation.duration_days | round(1) }} days</dd>
<dt>Convergence Tolerance</dt>
<dd>{{ data.simulation.tolerance }}</dd>
</dl>

## Time Series

### COD & Biogas Convergence

<div class="ts-placeholder">
{{ data.time_series.convergence_plot }}
</div>

### Key State Variables

<div class="ts-placeholder">
{{ data.time_series.state_variables_plot }}
</div>

---

<div class="footnote">
Generated by QSDsan Engine MCP | mADM1 Process Model | {{ meta.report_date }}
</div>
